description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Spell is initiated by the Sky Core Spell, which directly calls `exec()` on the

s SubProxy contract to perform the Spell's actions in the same transaction. The SubProxy limits rights to the specific Agent, preventing access to Sky Core contracts. The current SubProxy contract is designed to execute the

Spell is initiated by the Sky Core Spell, which directly calls `exec()` on the Prime's SubProxy contract to perform the Spell's actions in the same transaction. The SubProxy limits rights to the specific Agent, preventing access to Sky Core contracts. The current SubProxy contract is designed to execute the

summary: Expand StarGuard To Include All SubProxy Deployments
description: Add a new subdocument of `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.1.1 - StarGuard`. This document should be located directly before `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.1.1.1 - StarGuard Functionality` and read as follows: StarGuard Deployment *(Core)* - For each new SubProxy, the StarGuard contract should be deployed and initialized in the same Spell and added to the keeper job, StarGuardJob. Move `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3 - Execution Of Prime Spells` and its subdocuments to be subdocuments of `A.1.9.2.3.2 - Common Items`. prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
